raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The lab was not meeting their obligated demand and mismanaging specimen samples.",
    "The lab is processing 80,000 fewer tests a day than they are paid to.",
    "There were thousands of inconclusive COVID-19 test results.",
    "Repeated errors impacted patient results, including swapped samples and contamination.",
    "Uncertified lab techs were reported to be sleeping and on their phones during work.",
    "The COVID-19 testing program was described as dangerously inaccurate.",
    "Whistleblower allegations expose the misuse of taxpayer dollars.",
    "There is a concern regarding broken trust within the state government."
  ]
}
```
